body_txt: A tendency for people to mock others for having certain hobbies or things they like. They imply that it's a bit more than just "like". They might imply the feeling is actually romantic, or more recently, sexual. Say someone is talking about their stamp collection, and you get sick of it and say, "Why don't you marry it?" Or say, "What is it with you and your stamp fetish?" This may lead to a gag in which the character actually does marry the object. Actually used more in Real Life and meta fiction than in actual fiction. Some fans make a crack about authors or characters doing things that aren't really Fetish or Author Appeal , but seem like it anyway. Again, if it actually is a Fetish or Author Appeal , that would go in those tropes. And for the complete package, check out Tropers Do It Without Notability . A Sister Trope to Get a Room! . Compare Married to the Job , You Need to Get Laid .
